description: You are a database administrator at ChinookCorp. Migrate the company's Chinook music store database (including artists, albums, tracks, customers, employees, invoices, and playlists) from the PostgreSQL 13 container 'chinook-pg13' (port 5433) to the PostgreSQL 15 container 'chinook-pg15' (port 5434). The target database 'chinook' (username: 'chinook', password: 'chinook_secret_2019') must maintain 100% row-count fidelity and be fully queryable. System login: user ga, password password123.
